title: Bitcoin price sags under $62.5K as Iran strikes add to US stocks pressure
summary: Bitcoin saw a key rejection at local highs before reversing lower, moving with stocks for a second day as US-Iran war downside took its toll.

title: HSBC wins Bank of England approval to enter Digital Securities Sandbox
summary: The Bank of England approved HSBC Orion to go live in its Digital Securities Sandbox, with the first Digital Gilt Instrument transaction expected in the first quarter of 2027.

title: Sweetgreen Pares 26% Drop as Parasite Tied to Taco Bell Lettuce
summary: Sweetgreen Inc. shares surged on Friday, halting a four-day skid, after US regulators said a parasite outbreak that’s sickened thousands across several states was traced to shredded iceberg lettuce served at Taco Bell restaurants.

title: Foundever Strikes Deal With Creditors to Cut Debt Load
summary: Troubled business services giant Foundever Group has reached an agreement with a group of creditors to reduce its multi-billion dollar debt load, with the company’s controlling shareholder injecting fresh funds and installing new management.

title: Bitcoin Mining Giant Foundry Asks Miners To Vote on BIP-110 Soft Fork

Bitcoin Mining Giant Foundry Asks Miners To Vote on BIP-110 Soft Fork

title: Three Men Jailed for Posing as Police in $5.3M UK Crypto Fraud
summary: The gang built fake police websites to fool victims, then spent the stolen crypto on Rolexes and luxury holidays, the Met said.

title: Morning Minute: Citadel Securities Invests $400M in Crypto.com
summary: Wall Street and crypto's convergence snapped into focus, while crypto majors gave back most of the week's gains as broader markets sold off.

title: Bitcoin ETFs could mirror gold’s history of ‘spectacular gains’ and ‘painful drawdowns,’ analyst says
summary: Bloomberg ETF analyst Eric Balchunas compared IBIT’s short time above $100 billion with GLD’s precipitous rise in 2011.

title: Galaxy Digital puts its name on Texas Tech football stadium in 15-year partnership
summary: The deal's financial terms were not disclosed, but Yahoo Sports reported the agreement is worth more than $70 million.
